positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with session established
steps: Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the user is redirected to the home/dashboard page
Verify the authenticated user's name or email is visible in the UI (e.g., in navbar or profile section)
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login is successful as email fields should be case-insensitive; user is redirected to dashboard
steps: Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'TESTD1051@GMAIL.COM' in the username/email field (uppercase version of valid email)
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with email address containing uppercase characters

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Validation error messages such as 'Email is required' and 'Password is required' are displayed; login does not proceed
steps: Verify that validation error messages are displayed for both fields
Verify the user remains on the login page and is not redirected
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: An error message such as 'Invalid username or password' is displayed and login is denied
steps: Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials
Verify the user remains on the login page and is not redirected to the dashboard
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: An error message such as 'Invalid username or password' or 'User does not exist' is displayed; login is denied
steps: Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials
Verify the user remains on the login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid/non-existent email and any password
